title: 2 Pack 30oz Weeding Mattock Hoe, Small Rock Pick Axe with A Pointed Head and A Shock-Absorbing Handle Pick Axes for Digging, Mining, Carpenters, Geologists
features: DUAL HEAD DESIGN - This Garden Pick Tool has two different shapes of head design, one with a sharp tip to make it easier to break rocks and stones, and the other with a blunt head for leveling, compacting softer or loose soil, to cope with different work requirements.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - Our Weeding Mattock Hoe is made of carbon steel, a strong and wear-resistant material that can be used for long periods of time without being easily deformed or damaged, making them a very practical and professional tool.

WIDE OF USED - The Pick Axes For Digging are suitable for a variety of work scenarios. Whether for outdoor gardening, farmland reclamation, or indoor renovation, land preparation, it can be easily carried and used, providing convenient support for your various jobs.

APPEAARANCE - The handle of the Small Rock Pick Axe of the masonry pick has a rubberized non-slip design with a textured surface that provides good grip and friction, allowing you to hold the tool more securely, enhancing control during operation and helping to get the job done.

PACKAGE - You will receive 2 PCS Weeding Mattock Hoe, size 31 x 19.5 x 3.5cm /12 x 7.6 x 1.37 inch, the right size makes you easier to organize and manage, easy to pack into the toolbox or backpack, convenient to carry at any time, to meet different work needs.
description: MORE ADVANTAGES: ☆ The Pick Axes handle is ergonomically designed for a natural and comfortable grip, and the rubberized handle effectively absorbs vibrations generated during work, reducing hand fatigue and discomfort. ☆ Each Small Mattock Pick Axe is finely processed, smooth surface, sharp tip and blunt tip are carefully polished to ensure its quality and stability, improve accuracy and efficiency when working. Bring you a pleasant experience. SPECIFICATION: Material: carbon steel Color: yellow and black handle Size: 31 x 19.5 x 3.5cm /12 x 7.6 x 1.37 inch PACKAGE INCLUDED: 2 x weeding mattock hoe
